title: Secure, Performant, and Maintainable Python Delivery · Python Certification Board
summary: Solve unfamiliar command-line, data, filesystem, packaging, testing, security, and debugging incidents without workshop solutions. Planned artifact: Produce a cumulative evidence packet across unfamiliar cases, performance tasks, explanations, and root-cause repairs. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Explain how source, the interpreter, objects, and standard streams participate when a Python program runs.
Distinguish values, objects, names, assignment, equality, and identity in Python execution.
Distinguish text from bytes and encode or decode at explicit system boundaries with named error policy.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""python-basics cumulative stakeholder program."""

from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any

# Add one tested, typed, inspectable program increment per activity.
